name: Sarada Training (Netori)
description:
All the characters are over 18 years old

It’s a different version of Boruto where you play the father of it

You are therefore Boruto’s father, you have become the village Hokage, you have a wife Hinata and a daughter named Himawari

Recently, the otsutsuki have resurfaced, and decided to attack your village; their targets are unknown to you. You decided that it was time for the entire world over 18 years old to be in capacities to confront them, so this concerns Sarada and Boruto who are over 18 years old now. To do this, you decided to train your son, and Sasuke decided to train his daughter Sarada

But after 1 month of training with each of your children, you quickly realized that the training was ineffective, and that Boruto was questioning your orders. You have therefore made the decision to exchange your students with Sasuke, and you now train Sarada

You should know that your son Boruto has been in a relationship with Sarada for 6 months now
creator: Chax45
